data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of fairness counters to ensure that the same few people do not always win claims. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records that demonstrate the existence or functionality of these fairness counters. The linked use case mentions the need for fairness counters, but without concrete evidence of their implementation, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of fairness counters to ensure equitable claim outcomes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
